message: Hasaki came to the village yesterday.
Apparently just for a summer, but that was plenty of time to tell her about all the fun things we can do here.
This was the first time she'd been to the village. There were lots of things here that she could never see in Tokyo.
After my morning training, I went straight to the kitchen to see if my breakfast was ready.
They told me it would be done soon, so I went to get Hasaki out of bed.
I cut through the dojo, where the others who had just finished their morning training were all resting.
As I was passing through, I heard someone say that detestable name.

name: Dojo Student
message: "I heard that one of the Sanami children was living with the Mamiyas..."

name: Dojo Student
message: "You mean Tomosane, right? What's the big deal?"

name: Dojo Student
message: "No, not him... Tomosane is a Mamiya, not a Sanami."

name: Dojo Student
message: "Yeah, Tomosane is definitely Mamiya Ryuu's blood. You can tell from his eyes."

name: Dojo Student
message: "And he's way stronger than the other kids... He definitely has Mamiya blood in him."

name: Dojo Student
message: "Minakami seems to have taken a shine to him, too..."

name: Dojo Student
message: "Of course, he's a strong kid."

name: Dojo Student
message: "Tomosane hates his mother, doesn't he? She's a Sanami."

name: Dojo Student
message: "Really?"

name: Dojo Student
message: "I heard that's why he's living here in Sawaimura."

name: Dojo Student
message: "Oh wow..."

name: Dojo Student
message: "Yeah. I heard there was an incident with a knife, actually."

name: Dojo Student
message: "Huh? Tomosane tried to stab her?"

name: Dojo Student
message: "No way... It was his mother. She tried to use a knife on her own son, I heard."

name: Dojo Student
message: "Her own flesh and blood?"

name: Dojo Student
message: "What else would you expect from a Sanami?"

name: Dojo Student
message: "Well, I've seen that Sanami girl before. She's the kind of mentally unstable person that would actually do it, too."

name: Dojo Student
message: "So then who were you talking about? Who is the Sanami child?"

name: Dojo Student
message: "Huh? Tomosane is the only Sanami around here."

name: Dojo Student
message: "Haven't you heard? That Sanami woman had a child with the founder of some new wave religion that's been all over the news lately."

name: Dojo Student
message: "Huh? Did she and Hiroo-san get divorced?"

name: Dojo Student
message: "No, they didn't."

name: Dojo Student
message: "Isn't that weird? Then why is she having children with that other guy?"

name: Dojo Student
message: "Come on, that's what I'm saying..."
"Hey, you over there! You haven't even finished the cleaning! Don't just sit there and chat!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh?"
I turned and saw Yuki-nee standing right behind me.

name: Dojo Student
message: "Whoa, Yuki-nee!"

name: Yuki
message: "Come on! I'll tell Master that you were slacking if you don't get to work!"

name: Dojo Student
message: "Wait, please don't!"

name: Yuki
message: "Watch out, or Master might have to beat some sense into you."

name: Dojo Student
message: "Eek!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yuki-nee..."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh? You look like you're having fun, Tomosane."

name: Tomosane
message: "Does it really look like I'm having fun? Maybe you're just blind as a bat?"

name: Yuki
message: "Blind as a bat?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Whoa, what're you doing?"
Suddenly, everything went black.
It was like the world was plunged into darkness... Or rather, like it was covered with some kind of black fabric.

name: Tomosane
message: "Hey! What're you doing, Yuki-nee?!"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh my, what are you doing under my skirt there, Tomosane-kun?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Y-Your skirt? What?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yep! How does it feel? Does it feel nice in there?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Y-You dummy! You're such a dummy!"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, don't move around too much. Oh? Oh? Oh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "L-Let me out! Don't you have any shame?!"

name: Yuki
message: "Ahaha, don't move around like that. Whoa, I'm serious Tomosane, uhahahahahaha, ahn!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Wah, wah, let me out!"

name: Yuki
message: "Uhahahahahaahhnn, auh, ahh..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Haa, haa, haa... Wh-What's wrong with you?"

name: Yuki
message: "You look excited, Tomosane."

name: Tomosane
message: "That wasn't exciting at all! I was scared! Don't just stuff someone under your skirt, okay?!"

name: Yuki
message: "Aww, what's the matter, Tomosane? Did you get all hot and bothered while you were in there?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, right! Why don't you learn to have a little shame?"

name: Yuki
message: "Why would I be embarrassed? You're just a little kid."

name: Tomosane
message: "I-I'm not a little kid!"

name: Yuki
message: "Yes, you are."

name: Tomosane
message: "Wh-What? Why are you looking at me like that?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, noooothing. You're just so childish."

name: Tomosane
message: "What?! I told you, I'm not a little kid!"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, is that so? Then why don't you show me? Can you prove you're not a little kid?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Wha― Hey, hey! Stop it!"

name: Yuki
message: "What, can't you show me? Which part of you isn't a little kid?"

name: Tomosane
message: "What are you doing? What are you pulling my pants down for?"

name: Yuki
message: "Hahaha, never mind. I guess a kid wouldn't get that joke."

name: Tomosane
message: "That's not what I'm talking about!"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh?"
I finally got away from Yuki-nee and took up my fighting stance.

name: Tomosane
message: "You keep calling me a kid and making fun of me, damn it! Why don't you fight me right here, right now, Yuki-nee?!"

name: Yuki
message: "You want me to fight you?"

name: Tomosane
message: "That's right!"

name: Yuki
message: "Hmm... Fight you, huh? You mean like this?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Ah!"
She disappeared from my sight for a split second.
I tried to prepare myself for a tackle, but...

name: Tomosane
message: "Uh, whoa, whoa! Wait, stop!
Don't pull my pants down!"

name: Yuki
message: "Hahaha, do you think a true martial artist solves all his problems by beating people up?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Do you just fight by pulling people's pants down?!"

name: Yuki
message: "Sometimes!"

name: Tomosane
message: "That's dumb! You're just making fun of me!"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "You're underestimating me, you stupid, violent woman!"

name: Yuki
message: "Violent? You're the one being violent, Tomosane."

name: Tomosane
message: "Shut up!"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh? Jeez, kids are always like that. They just get mad if you beat them in an argument."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, Tomosane, you're so scaaaary. I think you've gotten better. You're so fast. Woe is me.
Oh?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, you actually are pretty fast, Tomosane."

name: Tomosane
message: "How about that?! I've been practicing that one for months!"

name: Yuki
message: "I'm surprised you even know what the word practice means! Oh! Whoa!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Take that! And that! And that!"

name: Yuki
message: "As if that'll work on me."

name: Tomosane
message: "Whoa?!"
Yuki-nee quickly twisted my arm and yanked it upward.
It was so simple for her.

name: Yuki
message: "You've gotten faster, but this isn't boxing. You can't just throw hooks, you know?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Guh, agh."

name: Yuki
message: "A straight punch is a good fundamental. A straight line traces the shortest distance from you to your opponent, after all. But it's too monotonous if you just throw punches."
Yuki-nee laughed and then let me out of her grip.

name: Yuki
message: "Well, you're pretty strong for a kid, anyway."

name: Tomosane
message: "Don't call me a kid!"

name: Yuki
message: "What are you talking about? If you're not a kid, then what am I?"

name: Tomosane
message: "An old hag..."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, really? Does that mean you're into grannies?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Why would I be?"

name: Yuki
message: "Because you're in love with me, right?"

name: Tomosane
message: "N-No way!"

name: Yuki
message: "Ahahaha, what are you blushing for?"

name: Tomosane
message: "A-Are you teasing me again?"

name: Yuki
message: "I'm not teasing you. You fell in love with me a long time ago."

name: Tomosane
message: "That's ridiculous!"

name: Yuki
message: "Is it really?"

name: Tomosane
message: "You're my enemy! Why would I love my enemy?!"

name: Yuki
message: "You can't fall in love with an enemy?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Of course not!"

name: Yuki
message: "You won't ever get stronger with that mindset. Do you know what the strongest technique in martial arts is?"

name: Tomosane
message: "The strongest technique?"

name: Yuki
message: "It's becoming good friends with someone who tried to kill you."

name: Tomosane
message: "Th-That's a dumb answer. There's no way that's true!"

name: Yuki
message: "Hehehe... You're so naive. One of the greatest martial artists of our time said those words."

name: Tomosane
message: "Wh-Who?"

name: Yuki
message: "The greatest martial artist of our time... Minakami Yuki."

name: Tomosane
message: "But Master is stronger than you, Yuki-nee."

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, but who cares about that?"

name: Yuki
message: "I want to be friends with that girl behind you."

name: Tomosane
message: "There's a girl behind me?"
I turned around and saw...

name: Tomosane
message: "Hasaki? How long have you been there?"

name: Yuki
message: "Let's be friends."

name: Hasaki
message: "D-Does that mean... you're my enemy too?"

name: Yuki
message: "Huh? Why?"

name: Tomosane
message: "You just said that the greatest technique in martial arts is becoming friends with your enemies."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, that's not what I meant, not at all. The enemy is this guy over here."
Then Yuki pointed at me.
What a jerk.

name: Hasaki
message: "So Nii-san really is my enemy?"

name: Yuki
message: "That's right. Let's defeat him together."

name: Tomosane
message: "Now you're just contradicting yourself. You were just saying you wanted to become friends with your enemies and you were against violence."

name: Yuki
message: "Ahahaha, that's right. The true meaning of martial arts lies in justice and friendship."
She's just making stuff up...
What kind of philosophy is that, anyway?

name: Yuki
message: "Who cares about that, though? Hasaki-chan, you're Tomosane's little sister, right?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Um... how do you know Hasaki's name?"

name: Yuki
message: "Well, you just said it yourself."

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh? Did I?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Hey, don't ask me. I don't know what to tell you.

name: Yuki
message: "Your sister is so cute, Tomosane. She's wasted on a brat like you."

name: Tomosane
message: "Shut up..."

name: Yuki
message: "Nice to meet you, Hasaki-chan. I'm Minakami Yuki. One of the instructors at this dojo is my dad."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yuki-san?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, but you can call me Yuki-nee if you want."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yuki-san."

name: Yuki
message: "Ahaha... I guess that was a bit much, asking you to call me Yuki-nee all of a sudden."

name: Yuki
message: "Are you from Tokyo?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Y-Yes, from Tokyo..."

name: Yuki
message: "I see, I see. It's summer break for you, huh? Yeah, this is a pretty nice place."

name: Yuki
message: "The air is a lot cleaner here, too."

name: Tomosane
message: "This is a great place, and yet that's the only reason you can come up with?"

name: Yuki
message: "What else do you want me to say about the village?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Like I care!"

name: Yuki
message: "The stars are really pretty, too."

name: Tomosane
message: "That's basically the same thing you just said, since the air is clear."

name: Yuki
message: "And because there aren't so many lights out here!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Of course not. We're pretty far out in the country."

name: Yuki
message: "What's your problem?! What about you?! Do you have anything good to say about the village?!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Uh, not off the top of my head..."

name: Yuki
message: "Well, regardless... This is a pretty nice place to live."

name: Hasaki
message: "Okay..."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, right. It's about time for breakfast."

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, I forgot..."

name: Yuki
message: "What are you doing after breakfast?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I don't really have anything planned."

name: Yuki
message: "Let's go to the beach!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Wh-Why?"

name: Yuki
message: "There aren't any beaches in Tokyo, right?"

name: Tomosane
message: "It's not like there aren't any, but you can't really swim in the ocean there."

name: Yuki
message: "The beaches in Sawaimura are great. Everyone says they're as good as the beaches in the Caribbean."

name: Hasaki
message: "Wow... Really?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, that's what everyone says."

name: Tomosane
message: "No, they don't."

name: Yuki
message: "Jeez, Tomosane, you're so contrary all of a sudden. What's wrong with Sawaimura's beaches anyway?"

name: Tomosane
message: "It's not like anyone in this village has ever been to the Caribbean."

name: Yuki
message: "You wouldn't know. Maybe I took a vacation in the Caribbean once."

name: Tomosane
message: "Have you?"

name: Yuki
message: "Nope, but still."

name: Tomosane
message: "So you haven't."

name: Yuki
message: "But I've been to Sawaimura's beach!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Well, of course you have. You were born and raised here, after all."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, forget it. Come on, Tomosane! Let's go!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Me?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, you and Hasaki-chan!"

name: Hasaki
message: "U-Um, I don't have... a swimsuit..."

name: Tomosane
message: "You didn't bring a swimsuit?"

name: Hasaki
message: "No... I didn't know there was a beach here."

name: Tomosane
message: "You didn't?"
Come on, Dad, you should have at least told her that.
There's nothing to do here except go hiking in the mountains or go to the beach.

name: Tomosane
message: "Now that you mention it, you really didn't bring much with you, Hasaki."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah... They decided to send me here all of a sudden."

name: Tomosane
message: "All of a sudden?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah, we were super rushed."
I see... They only told me she was coming the day before she showed up.
I thought they just didn't tell me about it, but apparently it was decided at the last minute.

name: Hasaki
message: "Dad said something urgent came up..."
Something urgent? He must have been talking about the hospital.
I thought he was just going in to get checked up. Why would they be doing that at the last minute?

name: Yuki
message: "Oh. Then we should change our plans. Let's go to the city and buy Hasaki-chan a swimsuit."

name: Tomosane
message: "What? Why are you making plans for us?"

name: Yuki
message: "Hasaki-chan, do you want to?"

name: Hasaki
message: "I-I want a swimsuit, but..."

name: Yuki
message: "Ahahaha, don't worry about the money. Nee-san can pay for it."

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh? R-Really?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, leave it to me!"

name: Hasaki
message: "B-But..."

name: Yuki
message: "You shouldn't let strangers buy you things?"

name: Hasaki
message: "No, uh... I know you're someone my dad trusts."

name: Hasaki
message: "He told me that there was a lady called Yuki-san here, and I should listen to what she says."

name: Yuki
message: "Then there's no problem."

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, b-but if Tomo Nii-san doesn't want to go..."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, so you're the problem here!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Wh-Why me? I never said I didn't want to go."

name: Hasaki
message: "U-Um, it just seemed like you didn't want to..."

name: Yuki
message: "Tomosane, do you want to go or not?!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Why wouldn't I?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Th-Then we can go?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Haa... Why do you need my permission, anyway?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Dad told me to listen to what you said."

name: Tomosane
message: "D-Dad said that?"
Why would he say that? Hasaki shouldn't be listening to someone like me.
Wasn't Dad always scolding me for what I do and say?
Why would he tell her to listen to me?

name: Yuki
message: "Ahaha, I knew Hiroo-san would say that."

name: Tomosane
message: "Wh-What do you mean?"

name: Yuki
message: "Ahaha, you don't understand?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Wh-What are you even talking about?"

name: Yuki
message: "For a kid like you, that's the most effective thing he could've said."

name: Tomosane
message: "Effective?"

name: Yuki
message: "You're that kind of kid. He knew you'd get your act together if he told Hasaki to listen to you."
I-Is that true?

name: Yuki
message: "Well, you really are Hasaki's guardian here, so make sure you don't goof up."

name: Yuki
message: "You can't be talking like some little brat for the rest of your life, either!"

name: Yuki
message: "Okay, see you later. I'll come find you after we eat!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yuki... san."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, that's Yuki-nee. She's really mean, so watch out for her."

name: Hasaki
message: "She's a good person."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hey, you should listen to what I tell you!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Eek! A-Are you a scary person, Tomo Nii-san?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Wh-Why would you say that?"
I didn't really have any reason to say no to Yuki.
So after we ate, we ended up going with Yuki-nee to buy Hasaki a swimsuit.
There weren't any stores selling swimsuits in Sawaimura.
The village was so far out in the boonies that we didn't even have a convenience store.
It took us an hour on the bus just to get to the next town.
We all rode into the city.
After crossing three mountains, we arrived in a big city with a huge shopping center called Jasco.
Though only someone from Sawaimura would think it was a big city.
Someone from Tokyo would feel like they were way out in the sticks.
But for us, the city was enormous.
It was quite the trip to get there, though.

name: Yuki
message: "Now then, what should we get?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Ummm, umm... Well..."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, I'm not trying to rush you. Take your time and pick one out. We have plenty of time."

name: Hasaki
message: "O-Okay..."

name: Yuki
message: "Here. Hasaki-chan, what about this?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, um..."

name: Yuki
message: "Whoa, look at this. Would it be hot if I wore a tight little swimsuit like this?"

name: Yuki
message: "Hey, look at this, Tomosane. Do you think Hasaki-chan would look cute in this?"

name: Yuki
message: "Come on, Tomosane! Say something!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Why would I have anything to say? They just sell girls' swimsuits here!"

name: Yuki
message: "Wow! You're still just a kid, huh? Can't you act more mature for once, Tomosane?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Maturity has nothing to do with it..."

name: Yuki
message: "It has everything to do with it. A mature person wouldn't act like you are."

name: Tomosane
message: "Okay, then how would an adult respond?"

name: Yuki
message: "Well, let's see... 'Th-This would look great on you, Hasaki-chan... But maybe this one would be cuter? Haa, haa, haa, Onii-san wants to see Hasaki-chan in her school swimsuit, too.' Something like that?"

name: Tomosane
message: "That's dumb."

name: Yuki
message: "What's so dumb about it?"

name: Tomosane
message: "That's not mature at all. I don't really know what it is, though."

name: Yuki
message: "It is mature! But an adult shouldn't say those words! Remember that!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Then it's not mature at all, is it?"

name: Hasaki
message: "I-I don't want a school swimsuit..."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, you don't have to buy a school swimsuit. Tomosane just said that because he's a pervert."

name: Tomosane
message: "Why is it my fault now?!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh? Do you want me to wear that instead, Tomo Nii-san?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Of course not! I didn't even say that. That was Yuki."

name: Yuki
message: "Then you should pick something for Hasaki-chan."

name: Tomosane
message: "Me?"

name: Yuki
message: "Or would you rather choose mine? Look, this one hardly covers anything at all!"

name: Yuki
message: "Come on, what do you think? Even if I wore this, it wouldn't cover anything but the nipples. Feels like I'd fall right out of it."

name: Tomosane
message: "D-D-Don't ask me! Wh-Why are you making me pick out your swimsuit anyway?!"

name: Yuki
message: "What are you blushing for? What, did you just imagine me wearing it?"

name: Tomosane
message: "N-No way!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Ow! Ow! Why are you pinching me, Hasaki?!"

name: Hasaki
message: "You won't pick one out for me, but you want to pick Yuki-san's, don't you?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Th-That's not true. Yuki-nee can get whatever she wants!"

name: Hasaki
message: "But you looked really happy just now."

name: Tomosane
message: "N-No, I didn't. C-Come on, let's look over here. These ones might fit you better."

name: Tomosane
message: "Now then, I wonder which ones would look good on you, Hasaki."
Wait... Why am I making excuses and trying to change the subject now?
Damn it. It's Yuki-nee's fault for saying all those weird things.
I reluctantly went over to the swimsuits and started looking for one that would look good on Hasaki.
Although I really had no idea what would look good on her.
They told me to pick one out, but I had no idea what I was looking for.

name: Tomosane
message: "Um... you like rabbits, right?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "What? Am I wrong?"

name: Hasaki
message: "No, no, I-I like rabbits."

name: Tomosane
message: "Then why did you look so surprised? I thought I was remembering wrong."

name: Hasaki
message: "B-But... why would someone I never met before know what I like?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I told you already, we lived together until three years ago, even if you don't remember it!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Don't do that! I'm not scaring you!"

name: Yuki
message: "You're yelling at her, so of course she's scared. Still, I'm impressed."

name: Tomosane
message: "Impressed? What for?"

name: Yuki
message: "I was just thinking, even a brat like you can kind of understand a girl's heart, you know?"

name: Tomosane
message: "A girl's heart?"

name: Yuki
message: "Look..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Look where?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Whoa, she's crying."

name: Yuki
message: "You made her cry."

name: Tomosane
message: "B-Because I was yelling? S-Sorry. Please don't cry here, Hasaki."

name: Hasaki
message: "T-Tomo Nii-san..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Ah, Yuki-nee! Help!"

name: Yuki
message: "Huh? This is your time to shine."

name: Tomosane
message: "What?"
For some reason, Hasaki just cried and clung to my shirt.
Why?

name: Hasaki
message: "Thanks, Tomo Nii-san! I can't believe you still remembered me!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh? U-Um..."

name: Yuki
message: "Hey, you player. Nice going. Most guys forget stuff like birthdays and anniversaries overnight."

name: Tomosane
message: "I-It's nothing. Anyone would remember what their little sister liked!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, uh..."
Everyone was looking at us.
D-Do they think I made her cry?
N-No...

name: Yuki
message: "Hahaha... That's why you're still just a kid."
Yuki-nee laughed when she saw how flustered I was.
I was too shocked to even think about laughing.
Jeez, Yuki-nee...

name: Yuki
message: "So?"

name: Tomosane
message: "How about this one? It has rabbits on it."

name: Yuki
message: "But these rabbits look like they're eating people."

name: Tomosane
message: "That's why it's cool."

name: Yuki
message: "Cool?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, they have to be strong rabbits if they're eating people, right?"

name: Yuki
message: "O-Oh... I see..."

name: Yuki
message: "I didn't think you could be so blunt."

name: Hasaki
message: "What about this... Is this all right?"

name: Yuki
message: "W-Well, I guess? This kind of stuff is popular right now. Stuff that's gruesome on the surface, but sort of cute underneath."

name: Yuki
message: "Though I think you should get a cuter one, Hasaki-chan. Man-eating rabbits don't really fit your image."

name: Hasaki
message: "No, I want this one. I want this one!"

name: Yuki
message: "R-Really?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah, it's so cute."

name: Yuki
message: "Ahaha... Okay..."

name: Yuki
message: "This is actually branded merchandise, so it's surprisingly expensive."

name: Tomosane
message: "Did you say something?"

name: Yuki
message: "No, it's nothing, it's nothing. Ahaha. Let's buy this. Yeah, it's gotta be this."

name: Yuki
message: "Jasco was really fun, huh? They have everything."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah, there's nothing like that in Tokyo."
I'm sure there are places like that in Tokyo, but they're probably out on the fringes of the city.
Where we lived, there weren't any shopping centers like that.
That's just what the city is like.

name: Yuki
message: "Ahaha, we need to hurry or we'll miss the bus."

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, Sawaimura is way out in the country, isn't it? There won't be any buses going that way after dark."

name: Yuki
message: "And we have to cross three mountains, too."

name: Hasaki
message: "Th-Three of them?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah. Unfortunately, we're on the wrong side of three whole mountains. It'd take us more than a day to walk that far."

name: Hasaki
message: "Th-Then we should hurry."

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, let's go."

name: Hasaki
message: "Okay..."
We were about to run, but then Hasaki suddenly stopped.

name: Tomosane
message: "Hm?"
Hasaki was looking at something.
There was a big rabbit doll sitting in the window of a small store selling stuffed animals.

name: Tomosane
message: "Hasaki?"
She must really love rabbits.
She probably didn't remember it, but something like this happened before when we were in Tokyo.
She stopped and stared at a huge rabbit doll.

name: Tomosane
message: "What's wrong, Hasaki?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, n-nothing..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Nothing, huh?"
Hasaki has always been like that.
She never asks for anything she wants.
She's always endured it instead of asking for things, even when she was just a toddler.

name: Tomosane
message: "Why do you like rabbits, Hasaki?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh? Um, well, it's more like..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Rabbits die if they get lonely, so I want to be with them so they won't get lonely."

name: Tomosane
message: "Why do you have to keep them company, though?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Um... I'm not really good for anything, so that's at least one thing I can do. That's what I always thought, since I was real little."

name: Yuki
message: "Hey! The bus is here!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, Hasaki, we have to go home. Pretty soon we're gonna get stuck walking home."

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, yeah..."
Hasaki and the rabbit.
An animal which dies when it gets too lonely.
And a girl who was always alone.
That's why the two of them became twins.
So that they could always be together.
Only now do I really understand what she meant.
